query: SELECT yearMonth, ROUND(SUM(CAST(kgInvoiced AS DECIMAL(14,2))), 2) as totalKg, COUNT(*) as totalRows FROM invoices WHERE yearMonth = '2026.02' GROUP BY yearMonth
